prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为6992→6804→6544→9067→8567名。2021–2023年位次在6500–7000名区间窄幅波动，2024年因选科要求调整（新增"首选物理，再 选化学"专业组）位次大幅后移至9067名，2025年小幅回升至8567名。近两年位次中枢明显后移约2000名，反映该校在湖北的竞争格局发生结构性变化；2021–20 25年物理类计划数分别为223→144→145→154→150人，2022年大幅缩减后保持平稳；2026年计划163人，较2025年增加13人（+8.7%），扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争有一定加剧 作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第39–41名区间（2026年第39名），属于国内顶尖理工类院校，在电子信息领域具有突出地位。 2022年高考周期内因两名学生学术不端事件获"偏负面"评价；2025年周期内因校园霸凌事件再次获"偏负面"评价；抖音综合热度排名第60位（较热），短视频曝 光量中等偏上。整体声誉偏负面但未出现严重断档或投档异常记录，对报考热度影响有限；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络 空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科。该校在电子信息、计算机领域的学科实力处于全国顶尖水平，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信 类专业2024年高热推荐，计算机类推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，该校核心招生专业均处于社会高热度区间。湖北省物理类考生数2021年14.7万→2025年25.0万持续增长，2026年总考生39.37万，按近年物理类占比约60.6%估算约23.9万 人，较2025年略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓和。；该校位于陕西西安（非本省），对湖北考生属跨省报考。地域招生汇总数据显示该 校在湖北招生占比未单独列出，但近年计划数稳定在150人左右，属中等规模招生省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年扩招8.7%（推高位次数字约445名）与湖北物理类考生预计减 少约4.5%（缓和竞争）的相互对冲，以及该校电子信息/计算机类专业持续高热、学校层次稳固但声誉偏负面的综合影响。预 测2026年最低位次约8982名，区间8482–9482名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（创新实验班；通信工程创新班、电子信息工程创新班、微电子科学与工程创新班）
- 计算机类（创新实验班；网络空间安全实验班、人工智能图灵班）
- 电子信息类（集成电路；微电子科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 电子信息类（通信；通信工程、信息工程、空间信息与数字技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息；电子科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程等）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 电子信息类（电子工程；电子信息工程、信息对抗技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 计算机类（网络安全；信息安全、网络空间安全）
- 计算机类（智能；人工智能、智能科学与技术）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控；机械设计制造及其自动化、自动化、电气工程及其自动化等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养；信息管理与信息系统、工业工程、大数据管理与应用）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8482–9482名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如8400名以内）可重点冲击一档创新实验班和集成电路等 王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约8900名附近）应以二档电子信息类和计算机类为主；位次接近区间上限（9400名左右）建议优先考虑三档管理科学与工程类保底，同时争取二档自 动化类专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 6992 → 6804 → 6544 → 9067 → 8567 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 6500–7000 range. In 2024, due to adjustments in subject selection requirements (newly added "Physics required, Chemistry optional" major group), the ranking significantly dropped to 9067, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 8567. In the past two years, the median ranking has notably shifted backward by about 2000 places, reflecting a structural change in the competition landscape for this university in Hubei. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 223 → 144 → 145 → 154 → 150, with a sharp reduction in 2022 followed by stability. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 163, an increase of 13 (+8.7%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively significant expansion and may intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with a stable ranking of 39–41 in recent years in the Shanghai Ranking (39th in 2026). It is a top-tier science and engineering institution in China, with a prominent position in the field of electronic information. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, it received a "somewhat negative" evaluation due to an academic misconduct incident involving two students. In the 2025 cycle, it again received a "somewhat negative" evaluation due to a campus bullying incident. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 60th (relatively popular), with medium-to-high short video exposure. Overall, the reputation is somewhat negative, but there have been no severe disruptions or abnormal admission records, so the impact on application popularity is limited. It has A+ in Information and Communication Engineering and Electronic Science and Technology, A in Computer Science and Technology and Cyberspace Security, and A- in Mechanical Engineering, totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above. The university's disciplinary strength in electronic information and computer science is at the national top level, providing sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation highly recommended. The core enrollment majors of this university are all in high social demand. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hubei increased continuously from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 393,700, and with the recent Physics Category proportion of about 60.6%, it is estimated to be about 239,000, a slight decrease from 2025, leading to a minor easing of competition pressure. The university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi (not within the province), so it is an inter-provincial application for Hubei candidates. Regional enrollment summary data shows that the university's enrollment proportion in Hubei is not listed separately, but in recent years, the planned enrollment has been stable at around 150, making it a medium-scale enrollment province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the mutual offset of the 8.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 (pushing the ranking number up by about 445 places) and the estimated 4.5% decrease in Hubei Physics Category candidates (easing competition), along with the sustained high popularity of Electronic Information/Computer majors, the stable university tier but somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 8982, with a range of 8482–9482.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Experimental Class; Communication Engineering Innovation Class, Electronic Information Engineering Innovation Class, Microelectronics Science and Engineering Innovation Class)
- Computer Science (Innovation Experimental Class; Cyberspace Security Experimental Class, Artificial Intelligence Turing Class)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits; Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Electronic Information (Communication; Communication Engineering, Information Engineering, Spatial Information and Digital Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information; Electronic Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, etc.)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering; Electronic Information Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Computer Science (Network Security; Information Security, Cyberspace Security)
- Computer Science (Intelligence; Artificial Intelligence, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control; Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digitalization and Business Intelligence Integrated Training; Information Management and Information Systems, Industrial Engineering, Big Data Management and Application).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8482–9482, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8400), you can focus on targeting Tier 1 innovation experimental classes and flagship majors like Integrated Circuits. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 8900), prioritize Tier 2 Electronic Information and Computer Science majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 9400), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 Management Science and Engineering majors as a safety net, while also aiming for Tier 2 Automation majors.
